creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

	I apologize for the awful delay. I had a port myself
of the kazaa linux version. That's why I took responsability
of this PR, so that I could merge our versions and commit
with you as maintainer.
	This long delay was due to my hope that KaZaA would
release a new linux version of their problem. As it stands,
there are no linux versions. Furthermore, they claim there
is no planed timeline for an english version.
	Do you want me to keep this PR opened as a reminder?
So that you can send me an updated version when/if KaZaA
releases a linux version? Or, can I close this PR since
it is no longer applicable?

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/33387

	Regards,

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - DF - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
Computer Science Undergraduate | FreeBSD Committer | CS Developer
flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
feature, n: a documented bug | bug, n: an undocumented feature
